meaning: adj.无现款的,无现金的,无钱的
examples: Does a cashless society really make good economic sense?
We are moving towards the cashless society.
Cashless payment has changed the way of our life and it is really convenient.
The academy will also be a "cashless community" with pupils using finger recognition technology.
The futuristic cashless society is marketed as being ultra-modern and at the forefront of technology.
